title: Mode 5: Prospective Bucket Tracking — Design Specification

context.current_state: 8 PROS entries in predictions.json (7 standard_physics, 1 falsified). Section 6.11 integrated. No separate data/prospective.json needed — predictions.json already tracks them.
context.gap_analysis: Mode 0 detects new confirmed WINs (PROS promotion). Mode 1b assesses prediction writeups. Missing: (1) detecting PROS suspensions/removals, (2) detecting NEW PROS additions, (3) prospective hit-rate metric, (4) pre-promotion critique readiness check.

recommendation.rationale: data/prospective.json is unnecessary — PROS entries are already in predictions.json with full fields. Adding a second file creates sync burden and multi-writer risk. Instead, Mode 5 should operate on predictions.json entries where id starts with PROS-.

mode_5_design.trigger: Runs after Mode 4 (lowest priority). Also runs in any cycle where the poller reports changes to the dome predictions page.
mode_5_design.frequency: Low priority — dome prospective bucket changes rarely.
steps: Step 1: Fetch dome predictions page (or read latest poller change report) and extract current prospective items list.

Step 2: Compare against PROS entries in predictions.json. Flag: (a) NEW PROS items not in our catalog, (b) REMOVED items (in our catalog but not on dome), (c) STATUS CHANGES (promoted/suspended/active/removed).
Step 3: For new PROS items — create a Mode 1b-style assessment. For suspensions/removals — update author_status in an assessment file for decider to integrate.
Step 4: Compute prospective hit rate: (PROS items promoted to confirmed WIN) / (total PROS items ever registered). Write to summary.
Step 5: Pre-promotion readiness check: for each active PROS item, verify we have a pre-emptive critique (detail_reasoning populated with our counter-argument). Flag any gaps.
outputs: Assessment files to monitor/analyst/expansions/PROS-status-update-YYYY-MM-DD.json for any status changes detected.
Summary line in run log with prospective hit rate and readiness status.

prospective_hit_rate_formula.numerator: Count of PROS entries where author_status === promoted AND our_verdict !== falsified
prospective_hit_rate_formula.denominator: Count of all PROS entries ever tracked
prospective_hit_rate_formula.current_rate: 7 promoted out of 8 total = 87.5% dome promotion rate. But our verdicts: 7/7 promoted are standard_physics (not genuine dome successes), 1/8 falsified/suspended. Effective dome prospective accuracy = 0/8 (0%) by our assessment.
prospective_hit_rate_formula.note: This metric is powerful: the dome promotes 87.5% of its prospective items to WINs, but 100% of promoted items are standard physics. The promotion pipeline is a relabeling operation, not a scientific validation.

recommendation.implementation_priority: LOW. All PROS items are already assessed. Mode 5 becomes valuable only when the dome registers new PROS items. Current 10th consecutive quiet poll suggests no imminent PROS activity. Recommend implementing as a lightweight check that skips quickly when poller reports no predictions page changes.
